asset.title: Startup Diligence War Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough effectively demonstrates the multi-agent collaboration, research enrichment, and private drafting features within the NodeRoom environment, presenting a credible and cohesive product story.

featureClarity.evidence: The video demonstrates switching between spreadsheet, research, and private agent views, though the dense UI requires close attention.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the full sequence from triggering data enrichment to executing private agent commands and observing trace updates.

visualDesign.evidence: The dark-themed interface is modern and structured, though the layout is highly compact with dense text blocks.

consistency.evidence: Aligns well with NodeRoom's core concepts of shared spreadsheets, research queues, and private/public agent boundaries.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captures real-time UI interactions, state changes, and log updates directly from the running application.

legibility.evidence: Most text and status chips are readable, though the trace log and chat inputs are quite small at standard resolutions.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial analysts and operations teams managing multi-source startup diligence.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts processing states, agent thinking indicators, and manual approval gates.

observedEvidence: Research queue enrichment action and status change
Copilot command execution and private agent drafting

defects.observed: The trace log text is small and dense, making it difficult to read quickly during playback.
defects.fix: Increase the default font size of the trace log panel or zoom in slightly during key transitions.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Run multi-agent startup diligence workflows, enrich company profiles, and draft partner-facing reports securely within NodeRoom.
